description: Phase 19 CLI/API promoted-row evidence mapping. All 90 CLI and 9 API rows are promoted to pass via committed offline direct differential evidence (scripts/cli_api_direct_differential.py). Selected-profile auth rows are closed; RPC rows are handled by Phase 20 fixture-backed evidence. exact_one_to_one_claim_ready remains false because explicit scope exclusions remain; release_candidate_ready remains false.
